CREATE TABLE intervals (id INT PRIMARY KEY, interval_value INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO intervals VALUES (1, INTERVAL 1 YEAR), (2, INTERVAL '5 days 3 hours'), (3, INTERVAL (random() * 10) MONTH);
SELECT id, interval_value, DATE '2023-01-01' + interval_value AS new_date FROM intervals;
SELECT id, interval_value, DATE '2023-01-01' - interval_value AS back_date FROM intervals WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, interval_value, datepart('year', interval_value) AS years, datepart('day', interval_value) AS days FROM intervals;
SELECT id, interval_value, interval_value + INTERVAL '1 month' AS incremented_interval FROM intervals;
CREATE TABLE events (event_time TIMESTAMP, duration INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 12:00:00', INTERVAL '2 hours'), (TIMESTAMP '2023-01-02 15:00:00', INTERVAL '1 day 5 hours');
SELECT event_time, event_time + duration AS end_time FROM events;
SELECT e.event_time, e.duration, e.event_time - INTERVAL '1 hour' AS updated_time FROM events e WHERE datepart('day', e.duration) > 0;
SELECT period, period + INTERVAL (datepart(part, period) || part) AS double_period FROM (SELECT INTERVAL (random() * 100) DAYS AS period) AS derived_table;
SELECT id, interval_value, DATE '2023-01-01' + INTERVAL datepart('month', interval_value) MONTH AS month_adjusted_date FROM intervals;
SELECT id, SUM(datepart('microsecond', interval_value)) AS total_microseconds FROM intervals GROUP BY id;
SELECT e.event_time, e.duration, (e.event_time + e.duration) - TIMESTAMP '2023-01-03 00:00:00' AS time_difference FROM events e;
SELECT e.event_time, INTERVAL '3 days' + e.duration AS extended_duration FROM events e WHERE datepart('hour', e.duration) < 5;
SELECT id, interval_value, DATE '2023-01-01' + INTERVAL '1 month' + interval_value AS total_date FROM intervals WHERE id = 1;
SELECT DATE '2023-01-01' - INTERVAL (SELECT MIN(duration) FROM events) AS adjusted_date;
SELECT id, DATE '2023-01-01' + INTERVAL (SELECT SUM(duration) FROM events) AS cumulative_end_date FROM intervals;
